step_rationale: Decreased lysophosphatidylethanolamine predicts post-MI mortality; myocardial lipid remodeling and injury marker.
mechanism: Decreased LPE (18:2) content post-MI reflects phospholipid catabolism and severity of myocardial ischemic injury.

references.title: Lipidomic analyses reveal potential biomarkers for predicting death and heart failure after acute myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Clinica chimica acta; international journal of clinical chemistry
